Lime Limestone Operations manufactures lime limestone products, supplying primarily construction (including highway, road parking contractors), metals (including steel producers), environmental (including municipal sanitation water treatement facilities flue treatment), services, industrial (including paper glass manufacturers), roof shingle agriculture (including poultry cattle feed producers) industries.
company headquartered Dallas, Texas, primarily serves markets Central United States consists open-pit quarries underground mine, plants distributions facilities owned Lime's wholly owned subsidiaries: Arkansas Lime Company, Colorado Lime Company, Texas Lime Company, U.S. Lime Company, U.S. Lime Company Shreveport, U.S. Lime Company Clair U.S. Lime Company Transportation.
Through wholly owned subsidiary, U.S. Lime Company ("U.S. Lime G"), under lease agreement (the Lease"), Lime royalty interests ranging from 15.4% non-operating working interest, resulting overall average revenue interest 34.8%, with respect rights wells drilled approximately 3,800 acres land located Johnson County, Texas, Barnett Shale Formation.
Through Lime Lime also drillsite production facility lease agreement subsurface easement (the "Drillsite Agreement") relating approximately acres land contiguous Johnson County, Texas, property.
Pursuant Drillsite Agreement, Lime receives royalty interest 12.5% non-operating working interest wells drilled from sites located property.

milestone reached when Scheme's trustees agreed distribute another £20,000 groups 2017 looking funding help bring their plans life.
Community Support Scheme established provide financial assistance range local community groups, clubs charities that selflessly devote their time energy improve quality life communities throughout region.
Applications invited from organisations that assist disadvantaged; promote encourage participation sporting activities arts; support education; benefit environment.
total donations have been made local community groups since 2008 with beneficiaries including Over 60's Youthful Group, Notts, Chesterfield Amateur Boxing Club, Mansfield First Responders, Nottinghamshire Wildlife Trust, Central Nottinghamshire MIND, Mansfield Senior Reds Walking Football Club, Mansfield North Nottinghamshire Society Deaf People many, many more.
Society's donations have helped groups heartland area fund variety things, including kayaks associated safety equipment, defibrillators, fibre optic carpet those living with autism, even lawnmower local crown bowling club maintain facilities.
Lynott, Chief Executive Officer Society, said "We're delighted have helped many great causes across region through Community Support Scheme.
always amazed selfless generosity individuals give their time week week out, provide invaluable support improve lives others.
